name: ad-platform-campaign-manager
description: Complete campaign management toolkit for tracking specialists. Guided campaign setup, keyword strategy, conversion tracking (GTM/sGTM/BQ bridge), reporting pipelines, optimization audits, and Google Ads Scripts. Phase 1: knowledge and guidance. Phase 2: live MCP API access.
author: Voxxy Creative Lab

skills.name: campaign-setup
skills.description: Guided campaign builder — walks through type selection, structure, ad groups, and keyword strategy with best practices

skills.name: keyword-strategy
skills.description: Keyword research, match type strategy, negative keyword planning, and structured keyword list generation

skills.name: conversion-tracking
skills.description: Google Ads conversion tracking via GTM/sGTM — conversion actions, enhanced conversions, offline imports, value-based bidding

skills.name: reporting-pipeline
skills.description: Google Ads to BigQuery reporting pipelines — GAQL queries, BQ schemas, dbt models, Looker Studio dashboards

skills.name: campaign-review
skills.description: Audit a campaign against best practices — structure, keywords, ads, bids, conversions, budget

skills.name: pmax-guide
skills.description: Performance Max guidance — asset groups, audience signals, feed optimization, PMax metrics interpretation

skills.name: budget-optimizer
skills.description: Budget allocation, bid strategy selection, spend forecasting, and target CPA/ROAS calculation

skills.name: ads-scripts
skills.description: Google Ads Scripts library — browse, customize, and generate automation scripts for bidding, reporting, and cleanup

skills.name: connect-mcp
skills.description: [Phase 2] Configure MCP connections to Google Ads API — OAuth setup, server selection, connection verification

skills.name: live-report
skills.description: [Phase 2] Pull live campaign data via MCP and generate formatted performance reports

agents.name: campaign-reviewer
agents.description: Full campaign audit: structure, keywords, ads, bids, conversions, budget. Produces scored report with prioritized recommendations.

agents.name: tracking-auditor
agents.description: Audits conversion tracking pipeline: Google Ads conversion actions vs GTM/sGTM implementation vs BigQuery data flow.
